title: tragopogon × bischoffii
intro: Tragopogon × bischoffii, also known as Bischoff's salsify or Bischoff's goat's beard, is a hybrid plant species within the sunflower family, derived from the cross between Tragopogon dubius and Tragopogon porrifolius. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragopogon × bischoffii include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Tragopogon × bischoffii can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including dried roots, tea infusions, and tinctures.
